study_title: Digital Behavioral Program for Episodic Migraine Prevention (MIG-CARE)
design_summary: 12-week, single-arm study of an app-based behavioral program (relaxation training, trigger tracking, and sleep regularization) for episodic migraine. Participants keep a daily headache diary in the study app.

criteria.probe: Have you been formally diagnosed with migraine by a doctor?

criteria.text: 4 to 14 migraine days per month, on average, over the past 3 months (episodic migraine; 15 or more headache days per month indicates chronic migraine and does not qualify).
criteria.probe: On average over the past three months, how many migraine days do you have per month?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot give a usable estimate of monthly migraine days, INC3 is unknown.

criteria.text: Owns a smartphone and is willing to complete a daily headache diary in the study app.
criteria.probe: Do you own a smartphone, and would you be willing to fill in a short daily headache diary in our app?

criteria.text: Willing to participate for the full 12 weeks.
criteria.probe: The program runs a full 12 weeks - is that a commitment you can make?

criteria.text: Currently pregnant or breastfeeding, or planning pregnancy within the next 6 months.
criteria.probe: Are you currently pregnant or breastfeeding, or planning a pregnancy in the next six months?

criteria.text: Uses acute headache medication (triptans or over-the-counter pain relievers taken for headache) on 15 or more days per month (medication-overuse pattern).
criteria.probe: On how many days per month do you take pain relievers or triptans for your headaches?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot estimate how many days per month they take acute headache medication, EXC2 is unknown.

criteria.text: Started a new preventive migraine medication, or changed the dose of one, within the past 8 weeks.
criteria.probe: Have you started a new preventive migraine medication, or changed the dose of one, in the past eight weeks?
Have you ever been diagnosed with cluster headache?

criteria.text: Currently enrolled in another interventional clinical trial or structured headache program.
criteria.probe: Are you currently enrolled in another clinical trial or a structured headache program?
